public_reputation: Known around Sealwater Conclave through day-to-day work as commerce broker.
appearance: Rosal Hearthwrit carries the marks of commerce broker in ink, rain, and polished cloth: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Evaluates every conversation for margin, dependency, and what can be made to move next. In Sealwater Conclave, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of commerce broker in and around Sealwater Conclave, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Sealwater Conclave while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Rosal Hearthwrit can draw the party into a locality problem centered on commerce broker duties in Sealwater Conclave.
Rosal Hearthwrit becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with agenda backlog, precedence disputes around Sealwater Conclave.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Rosal Hearthwrit is immediately readable as a commerce broker tied to Sealwater Conclave.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Sealwater Conclave: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Rosal Hearthwrit presents as someone shaped by the duties of a commerce broker and the daily pressures of Sealwater Conclave.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a commerce broker, and proof that strangers will not make Sealwater Conclave harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Rosal Hearthwrit refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a commerce broker too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can redirect supply, access networks, and read market pressure clearly.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Rosal Hearthwrit adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Rosal Hearthwrit always knows more about Sealwater Conclave than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a commerce broker in Sealwater Conclave.
social_texture: Rosal Hearthwrit speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Sealwater Conclave, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Rosal touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Rosal Hearthwrit when the party needs a socially grounded face for Sealwater Conclave: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
